quickSwitchTimeout.name: Quick Switch Timeout (ms)
quickSwitchTimeout.description: Timeout to distinguish a quick Alt+Tab toggle from the full task switcher
quickSwitchTimeout.description[zh_CN]: 区分快速 Alt+Tab 切换与完整任务切换器的超时时长

forceSoftwareCursor.name: Force Software Cursor
forceSoftwareCursor.description[zh_CN]: 强制使用软光标进行渲染

enablePrelaunchSplash.name: Enable Prelaunch Splash
enablePrelaunchSplash.description: Enable showing prelaunch splash screens during application startup
enablePrelaunchSplash.description[zh_CN]: 启用应用程序启动期间显示预启动闪屏服务

prelaunchSplashTimeoutMs.name: Prelaunch Splash Timeout (ms)
prelaunchSplashTimeoutMs.description: Timeout before destroying unmatched prelaunch splash wrappers
prelaunchSplashTimeoutMs.description[zh_CN]: 在未匹配到窗口时销毁预启动闪屏的超时时长

debugSource.name: Debug Remote Source
debugSource.description: Enable the Qt Remote Object remote source for window tree debugging tools. Performance impact when enabled.
debugSource.description[zh_CN]: 启用窗口树调试工具的Qt Remote Object远程数据源。开启后会有性能影响。

showOtherUserOption.name: Show Other User Option
showOtherUserOption.description: Show the 'Other...' entry in the login user list to allow logging in as an unlisted (e.g. LDAP/NSS) user
showOtherUserOption.description[zh_CN]: 在登录用户列表中显示 Other... 选项，允许以未列出的用户（如 LDAP/NSS 用户）登录

primaryOutputId.name: Primary Output ID
primaryOutputId.description: Output id recorded as the primary output. Empty means no primary output has been saved.
primaryOutputId.description[zh_CN]: 记录为主屏幕的输出 ID。空字符串表示未保存主屏幕。
